dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, your efforts to {quest_action} rattled {quest_threat_animate_the}. They have turned desperate and struck at {quest_stakes_the} again.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} confirmed that {enemy_type_plural} are being used as enforcers near {quest_focus_the}. They have been gathering {location_hint}. We need to break through them and cut off the escape route.
dialogueChunks.outro: Justice demands we finish this. They cannot be allowed to keep hurting people.

dialogueChunks.intro: It is worse than we thought, {player_name}. Since you began to {quest_action}, we discovered that {quest_threat_the} did not act alone.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: There are accomplices hiding near {quest_focus_the}. {quest_ally} found evidence {location_hint}. The {enemy_type_plural} they recruited are guarding the area. We need to cut through every last one of them.
dialogueChunks.outro: Every one of them played a part in harming {quest_stakes_the}. They all answer for it.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, {quest_threat_animate_the} left a warning. They know you are coming, and they have fortified their position near {quest_focus_the}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} intercepted signs that {enemy_type_plural} are patrolling the approaches {location_hint}. They are daring us to come after them. {quest_stakes_The} will remain at risk until we confront them directly.
dialogueChunks.outro: They think they can intimidate us. Prove them wrong.

dialogueChunks.intro: They hit us again last night, {player_name}. Retribution for your work to {quest_action}. They are trying to break our will.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: This time they sent {enemy_type_plural} directly at the settlement as a warning. {quest_ally} drove them off, but there are more massing {location_hint}. If we do not strike their staging ground now, the next attack will be worse. {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} on the line.
dialogueChunks.outro: Find their camp and destroy it. Show them that vengeance cuts both ways.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, {quest_threat_animate_the} is trying to erase the evidence. They sent {enemy_type_plural} to destroy what remains of {quest_focus_the}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: If those creatures finish the job, there will be nothing left to recover: no proof of the crime, no trace of {quest_stakes_the}. {quest_ally} says the {enemy_type_plural} are already tearing through the area {location_hint}. We need them stopped immediately.
dialogueChunks.outro: Kill them before they destroy everything. Without that evidence, justice becomes impossible.

dialogueChunks.intro: The criminals are running, {player_name}. Your pursuit has them panicking, and panicked people make dangerous choices.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: They released the {enemy_type_plural} they had been keeping as guard animals: set them loose near {quest_focus_the} {location_hint} as a distraction. The creatures are rampaging through the area. {quest_ally} says we must deal with them before we can follow the trail further.
dialogueChunks.outro: Put down the {enemy_type_plural} they unleashed. Once the chaos is contained, we close in.
